name: cc-fleet
description: Fan out provider LLM subagents and multi-phase JS workflows from Codex via the cc-fleet CLI — DeepSeek / GLM / Kimi / Qwen / MiniMax, or your Codex/Claude subscription. Each worker receives its credential on demand, never through its env or argv. Requires the cc-fleet and claude binaries on PATH (installed separately).

interface.shortDescription: Fan out provider-LLM subagents and workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Drives the cc-fleet CLI from a Codex session: one-shot or batch provider subagents (cc-fleet subagent) and multi-phase JS workflows (cc-fleet workflow), over DeepSeek / GLM / Kimi / Qwen / MiniMax or a Codex/Claude subscription. Workers run on the claude engine; their credentials never touch env or argv. The cc-fleet and claude binaries are installed separately.
defaultPrompt: Fan out three cc-fleet subagents to research this in parallel, then combine.
Run a cc-fleet workflow to audit these files across providers.
